interface.longDescription: AAAA-Nexus MCP exposes the Atomadic trust, safety, UEP orchestration, compliance, agent economy, LoRA, and verifiable randomness API surface through MCP. The Rust Worker backend remains the enforcement authority; MCP clients receive ergonomic tool wrappers and public-safe structured envelopes.
